creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello,

Thank you for the report, I have to admit that it does not tell me
anything though. I dont understand russian and the support is english
only. Can you please translate it into English? Also: please consider
asking around on the mailinglists first before submitting a PR ticket.

thanks,
remko

-- 
Kind regards,

      Remko Lodder               ** remko@elvandar.org
      FreeBSD                    ** remko@FreeBSD.org

      /* Quis custodiet ipsos custodes */
